svg.text: 3 SPHERES · 6 HALOS · 2 FIGURE-8 CROSSED BELT DRIVES · 1 CORPUS CALLOSUM
POLAR HALOS = EMOTION WHEEL (2D LOCKED) · EQUATORIAL HALOS = OPPOSING DYNAMICS
CORTEX + ANGEL = same emotion · DEMON = 180° COUNTER-ROTATED (the conflict)
cortex FEAR → demon ANTICIPATION · cortex SADNESS → demon JOY · CONSCIENCE MOVES CURSOR
NOT part of the brain · the voice that sits OUTSIDE and tells him the truth
"Yeah... if you say that, this is what's actually gonna happen."
"Nice one — you're getting some time back."
"Nice stuff. When did you last see your kids?"
"You're rich. And alone. That what you wanted?"
"...and everyone who loved you is gone."
EXAMPLE: MONEY vs TIME · conscience can judge on any axis below ↓
1. Cortex thinks of something to say
2. Before he says it — he phones a friend
"You're about to fuck your future for a quick win."
"That's gonna hurt someone you care about."
3. He listens. Or he doesn't. Free will.
figure-8 crossed belt → cortex spins ↻ → hemispheres spin ↺ · TIGHT COUPLING · no slop
polar halos = emotion (2D locked) · equatorial halos = opposing dynamics
each sphere = ballpoint pen tip · cortex fine-tunes emotion to draw linear points in time
NEURALINK: 2 implants → 2 hemispheres → figure-8 counter-rotation → calibration vector
